title: Get High with Me
lyrics: Yeah, you know what I'm saying? Don't worry about it. We'll still hit the time. We always do, you know what I'm saying? Always do. Always do. Now we see which way we gon' be. Life, love, yeah, fuckin' liberty. Maniacal greed. Planted secrecy. Too radical greed. A social network greed.  Grace, forgiveness, fantasy. But the evil priest isn't free. Nah, nah. Nothing is free. Get to justice. Mind not. Years of wars. Tools and goals. Law. A door to own. Other parts of stones. In a zone. Computer tell me to don't. Submit the pledge. Shut up. Eclipse. Lights. Spliff. Brains drown. You just repeat the sounds. You question the crown. Sony. Ballot. Blot. Denial. Give anything to disagree with me. Everything for what I do. World new. Yeah. The world new. Pull up in the bench. Intolerated and spent. Disconnected. Disappointed. Left against end. Pretty bleed. Evil states. I cannot hear. It's one to fear though.  You get high. Don't get high with me. You get high. Don't get high with me. Forget life. Forget day. Forget all things. Tell me why. Don't get high with me. You get high. Don't get high with me. Don't get high with me.  You get high with me. When life's gone. It's all ugly. When the high might erupt. Create poverty. So come along and give in. Doesn't matter, no one wins. Strata and self rights is close. With a face hidden. Like the cobra in the monster form within. And then I'll read what I rhyme. And I'll roll what I know. That's why we've got to tose our own diapers. The void you avoid by the end of a point,  You're so slick, you're lust. Tough as cliff. Hydroponic acid hits. Set sail, your mind's adrift. Even though you're going round trip. No escaping it. Evading it. Probably should engage a bit. Don't be a slave to shit. Your design of D-shit is legit. The bowl is lit. Come and let your mind slip a bit. Better than always. Tripping over shit. Chilling. Yeah, you fucking villain. Conscious mind spilling from the narrow synapse. Would you like a spinal tap? Welcome, welcome. One and all. Forget memories big and small. In these blurry halls. Muddy walls. Higher than an electric arm. Milky is the way I like to stay. Every minute. Every day. Your outlet needs a plug. Supplement those emotions, bro. Toss them out the window. No good to you now. Slip under meta-cover. Tell your legs are made of rubber. Oh yeah, when you get high with me. Come get high with me. Come get high with me. Come get high with me. You get high. You get high. You get high. You get high. You get high. You're dead high. You get high. You're dead high. You get high. You get high.   Come get high with me. Come get high with me. Come get high with me. Come get high with me. Come get high with me. Come get high with me. Come get high with me. Come get high with me. Come get high with me. Get high with me.     Get high. I'm talking about war and shit. And like, fucked up shit. Like, fucked up shit. Like, really, really fucked up shit guys. Wow.
